.github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml.role: Staging CD entrypoint. On push to master / workflow_dispatch: validate -> server-side dry-run -> deploy. Opens SSH tunnel, builds kubeconfig (ci-deployer), renders+applies secrets, applies k8s/staging/*.yaml (excluding 5 operator-bootstrapped manifests), verifies rollouts and services/cronjobs.

.github/workflows/deploy-observability.y.role: Observability CD entrypoint (independent concurrency group; does not block runtime CD). Applies monitoring stack (obs-ci-deployer) and error-tracking GlitchTip stack (obs-ci-deployer-et) with separately scoped tokens, server-side apply, then verifies rollouts.

scripts/ssh-tunnel-up.sh.role: CI pre-flight gate. Opens background SSH local-forward 127.0.0.1:16443 -> k3s API 6443; fail-closed verifies TCP reachability before any kubectl. Exit 64 on missing config, 1 if unreachable.

scripts/kubeconfig-setup.sh.role: Builds kubeconfig from SA token + CA cert via kubectl config set-* (tls-server-name=10.8.0.1). Verifies non-anonymous identity. Parameterized by K8S_USER_NAME/K8S_CONTEXT_NAME for multi-context obs deploys.

scripts/render-staging-secrets.py.role: Renders solid-stats-staging Kubernetes Secrets (postgres, rabbitmq, ghcr pull, server-2, replays-fetcher, S3, Sentry DSNs) from env vars to multi-doc YAML. stdlib only; exit 64 on missing required env. No secrets in git.

scripts/render-obs-secrets.py.role: Renders observability Secrets (Grafana admin, pg_monitor, GlitchTip secret/postgres/superuser) for monitoring + error-tracking namespaces to multi-doc YAML from env. Exit 64 on missing required env.

scripts/split-obs-secrets.py.role: Splits render-obs-secrets output into per-namespace files (monitoring vs error-tracking) so each scoped CI token applies only its own secrets (T-16-11).

scripts/validate-staging.py.role: Static staging validator run in CI validate job: manifest structure, secret renderer dry-run, py_compile, embeds validate-s3-lifecycle assertions. No cluster access.

scripts/validate-obs-manifests.py.role: Static obs manifest gate (DEP-04): no secret values in Secrets, namespace: monitoring on namespaced resources, priorityClassName: obs-background on pod specs. Runs in obs CI validate job.

scripts/validate-edge.py.role: Offline structural validator for Phase 7 edge artifacts (nginx vhost, certbot drop-in, deploy hook, ufw rules). No live VPS needed.

scripts/validate-obs-edge.py.role: Offline structural validator for Phase 14 obs-edge artifacts (bootstrap-obs-edge.sh, grafana. + errors. vhosts, systemd artifacts).

scripts/validate-s3-lifecycle.py.role: Offline validator for S3 lifecycle policy: Expiration (Days>=30 floor) on backups/postgres/ and AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload. Single source of truth, reused by validate-staging.py.

scripts/validate-phase-12.sh.role: Live kubectl assertion harness for Phase 12 (resource protection / obs foundation, PREP-01..05).

scripts/validate-phase-13.sh.role: Live assertion harness for Phase 13 metrics stack (MET-01..06), --quick skips Grafana port-forward checks.

scripts/validate-phase-15.sh.role: Live assertion harness for Phase 15 log stack (Loki/Alloy, LOG-01..03).

scripts/validate-phase-16.sh.role: Live assertion harness for Phase 16 error tracking (GlitchTip ERR-01..03), --internal/--public/--quick modes.

scripts/validate-stack.sh.role: Full obs validation orchestrator (VAL-01) composing validate-phase-13/15/16. Fails on first sub-script failure.

scripts/backup-postgres-now.sh.role: Creates a one-off Job from cronjob/postgres-backup, waits for completion, parses backup_id/dump/list/manifest objects from logs.

scripts/restore-drill.sh.role: Applies restore-drill Job (k8s/staging/restore-drill/70-restore-drill.yaml), tails logs, confirms PASS/FAIL, cleans up.

scripts/start-controlled-full-run.sh.role: Gated full run: refuses unless docs/backup-gate.md contains 'Status: verified', then runs a one-off Job from cronjob/replays-fetcher.

scripts/apply-s3-lifecycle.sh.role: Operator-driven Job (inline spec, never reaches CD glob) applying config/s3/backups-lifecycle.json to the S3 bucket.

scripts/resource-preflight.sh.role: Re-runnable node CPU/mem/disk + pod allocation snapshot, run before applying obs workloads to record headroom.

scripts/bootstrap-edge.sh.role: Idempotent adopt-reconcile for the staging host nginx edge: backs up live vhost, installs repo vhost + certbot drop-in + deploy hook + ufw rules. Run on VPS as root.

scripts/bootstrap-obs-edge.sh.role: Env-parameterized obs-edge bootstrap wiring grafana./errors. subdomains into host nginx (DOMAIN-driven; SKIP_UPSTREAM_CHECK for cert-only).

scripts/teardown-edge.sh.role: Reverses bootstrap-edge.sh: restores original vhost, removes drop-in/hook/edge ufw rules. Preserves certs, ufw 22/tcp, and ufw enabled state.

scripts/cutover.sh.role: 4-gate reversible production upstream switch. Gate A backup-gate verified, Gate B diff-readiness strict_failures:0; switches nginx upstream at CUTOVER marker, validates, reloads, smoke-checks, auto-rollback. DRY_RUN/SELF_TEST modes.

scripts/test-glitchtip-ingest.sh.role: ERR-03 forced-error ingest test: POSTs synthetic Sentry envelope via port-forward to GlitchTip, asserts 200/202, optionally polls issues API.

k8s/staging/00-namespace.yaml.role: solid-stats-staging Namespace (cluster-scoped; operator-applied, excluded from CD).

k8s/staging/01-ci-rbac.yaml.role: ci-deployer ServiceAccount + RBAC for runtime CD (operator-applied, excluded from CD).

k8s/staging/01-obs-rbac.yaml.role: obs namespaces + obs-ci-deployer RBAC (operator-applied, excluded from CD).

k8s/staging/02-priority-classes.yaml.role: Cluster-scoped PriorityClasses incl. obs-background (operator-applied, excluded from CD).

k8s/staging/03-alloy-rbac.yaml.role: Alloy ClusterRole + ClusterRoleBinding (operator-applied, excluded from CD).

k8s/staging/35-server-2-deployment.yaml.role: server-2 Deployment (GHCR image pinned to SHA).

k8s/staging/37-web-deployment.yaml.role: web Deployment (GHCR image pinned to SHA).

k8s/staging/50-replays-fetcher.yaml.role: replays-fetcher CronJob (kept suspended until backup/restore validation passes).

k8s/staging/60-postgres-backup.yaml.role: postgres-backup CronJob writing dump/list/manifest to S3 backups/postgres/.

k8s/observability/60-grafana-dashboards..role: Grafana dashboard ConfigMaps (vendored JSONs from dashboards/).

config/nginx/sites-available/stats-stagi.role: Public stats vhost; carries the CUTOVER upstream marker switched by cutover.sh.

config/nginx/sites-available/grafana-sta.role: Public Grafana subdomain vhost (proxies to in-cluster Grafana).

config/s3/backups-lifecycle.json.role: S3 lifecycle policy: Expiration on backups/postgres/ + AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload.

config/systemd/certbot-deploy-hook.sh.role: certbot deploy hook reloading nginx on renewal.

config/systemd/certbot-renew-failure.ser.role: systemd unit firing on certbot renew failure.

config/systemd/certbot.service.d/onfailu.role: certbot.service OnFailure drop-in wiring the renew-failure unit.
